svg.text: Schedules → workflows → activities on the radar-ng task queue · no cron anywhere · mobile reaches Temporal only through FastAPI
TEMPORAL SCHEDULES · OVERLAP = SKIP · CATCH-UP WINDOW 1 H
starts workflow — slow run skipped, never queued
failed hour heals on next run
diff NWS alerts vs last seen
entity — one per user × storm cell
polls MRMS every 60 s → push on change
every side effect is an activity
task queue radar-ng — every workflow + 20 activities, max 4 concurrent
activities live in backend/: mrms_process_frame · hrrr_process_forecast_hour
SIGTERM → graceful drain (25 s) · worker versioning via build_id
PNG pyramids · float32 grids · JSON state
